titleStmt.title: SII 18.147: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 147. (B.K. No. 79 of 1933-34.) ASUṆḌI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up against the front wall of the temple of Kallēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the cyclic year Rudhirōdgāri, Vaiśākha śu. 13, Thursday, of the reign of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalla. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1143, April 29, Thursday, ·03.

It states that when Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati, Kannaḍasandhivigrahi, Hiriya-Daṇḍanāyaka and Paṭṭasāhaṇi Bammadēvayya was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand, Āditya-Nāyaka, the officer in charge of tolls of the division of Innūṛāṛum-bāḍa and others made a grant of income derived from certain taxes to the god Kalidēvasvāmi of Hasuṇḍi (modern Asuṇḍi.). The gift is stated to have been made on the occasion of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa when Chāva-gāvuṇḍa was the Ūrgāvuṇḍa and under the instructions of Mahāpradhāna Dēvarayya, the officer in charge of the hejjuṅka and vaḍḍarāvuḷa taxes of Banavāsi Twelve-thousand.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī samastalōkaśikhāmaṇi rāmara
śirōmaṇi namagādaradiṁ sōmakaḷā gīge puṇyasaṁpadama
svasti samastaprasāstisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati ka
nnaḍasaṁdhivigrahi hiriyadaṇḍanāyakaṁ paṭṭasāhaṇi bammadēvayyaṁga
ḷu banavase pannicchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷanadindāḷuttamire tatupāda
padmōpajīvi © svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāpradhā
naṁ banavase pannirchāsirada hejjuṁka vaḍḍarāvuḷa daṁḍanāyakaṁ dē
varayyaṁgaḷa besadi . yinnūṟāṟuṁ bāḍada suṁkada heggaḍe Ādityanāyakanuṁ
dēkimayyanuṁ biṭṭimayyanuṁ bammadēvanuṁ yintī nālvarumi ḷu taḷa baṁḍa davasāReadḻdum
yada hēṟina suṁka hattakondumaṁ hattiya maḷaveya suṁka nūṟa A letter written behind this has been scored out with a cross
ydumaṁ Eleya hēṟu hattakondumaṁ Aḍakeya suṁkadoḷage lakkake
paṇa Eraḍumaṁ vokkaludeṟe sēse kāṇikeyoḷage hattakoṁde
maṁ Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpātadaṁdu hasuṁḍiya kalidēvasvāmi ge
biṭṭaradeṁteṁdaḍe . negarddudu tēja tanagudubhavakaramuṁ pogeḷtevaḍe
dududāraguṇadoḷpu negaḷe negaḷdaṁ vinayānvitanene saduguṇanidhi
cāvagavuṁḍa yāva . Antenisi negaḷda mārana kānte mahāsatige mā
cikabbege nayadiṁ santōsamodave puṭṭidanantaguṇaṁ cāvaneseva gōtrapavi
tra . Antu cāvagāvuṁḍa Ēkabhōgadiṁ Ūrggāvuṁḍu geyvuttamire . svasti śrīma
tu pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalla varṣada rudhirōdugārisaṁvatsara
da vaiśākha suddha 13 bri dinakṣayaṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍida puṇyati
thiyalu hasuṇḍiya śrīkalidēvasvāmige Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ biṭṭa suṁkamaṁ
śrībrahmasiṁgipaṇḍitara kāla kacci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru . Intī
dharmmamaṁ Āvanōrvva tanna naḍasi kāladoḷu pratipāḷisidaṁge vāra
ṇāsi kurukṣētraveṁbargghyatīrtthadoḷu sahasra kavileya
ma sahasra brāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phalamakku . Idanaḷidaṁge sahasra
brāhmaṇaruma sahasra kavileyumaṁ konda paṁcamahāpā
takanakku © maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī © © ©
saṁbhuvina kalpitā
Digital edition of SII 18.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
